englishDefinitions: To leave a place and appear outside or in public.
To become known or be published.
To openly tell people something personal, especially one's sexual orientation or identity.
persianTranslation: آشکارا بیان کردن هویت شخصی یا گرایش جنسی
examples: The sun came out after the storm.
Her new book is coming out next month.
He came out to his family when he felt ready.
